transcription.text: Mommy, I want a drink. Mommy, can I have a glass of juice, please? Give me some more. I'm thirsty. I'm thirsty. Give me a glass of anything. Wouldn't it be nice if your children could get their own drinks without interrupting you? With a Dixie Kitchen Dispenser, they can. And your kitchen won't be cluttered with between-meal glasses to wash. Get Dixie, the kitchen cup that lets kids help themselves. And that can be a big help to you. Mommy, I got my own juice. Now can I have peanut butter sandwich?
